ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data series */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data series */,
  "start_datetime" TEXT /* Start date and time when the data series was collected */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End date and time when the data series was collected */,
  "start_position" TEXT /* Start position (latitude and longitude) where the data series was collected */,
  "end_position" TEXT /* End position (latitude and longitude) where the data series was collected */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cruise during which the data series was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data series */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_start_position FOREIGN KEY ("start_position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "metadata_schema" TEXT /* Metadata schema associated with the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruises" (
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise */,
  "cruise_name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project associated with the cruise */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cruise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cruise */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship used for the cruise */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the cruise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cruises_ship_name FOREIGN KEY ("ship_name") REFERENCES ships ("ship_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the position */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the position */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth at the position */,
  "water_temperature" TEXT /* Water temperature at the position */,
  "salinity" TEXT /* Salinity at the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data series */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data series was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship */,
  "operational_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship started operations */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ship (e.g., number of crew members, scientific equipment) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)
